description:
Introductions:

 61Key Digital Piano Folding Piano Semi-Weighted Standard Keyboards Digital Piano Design adopts superior quality custom Dream Sound source, which can bring you the most striking sound effects. Our 61 key piano with two Dual Bluetooth，Audio Bluetooth and MIDI Bluetooth，Connect a COMPUTER or tablet with a USB cable for multimedia interaction. After the piano is turned on, bluetooth will be automatically turned on. The mobile phone can search the MIDI Bluetooth signal of this piano. After the connection, the playing software on the mobile phone can realize the wireless connection with the piano. it can also be used as a gift for relatives and friends, or as a prop for theatrical performances.

Features:

  1. Superior Quality Custom Dream Sound Source
  2. 8 Polyphony/ 80 Demo Songs/ 200 Rhythm/ 200 Timbre
  3. Built-in two 3 W Stereo Speakers
  4. One Pedal System：Sustain pedal-Continuously increasing lengths of sustained notes,from slight to full
  5. Dual Bluetooth，Audio Bluetooth and MIDI Bluetooth.
  6. After the piano is turned on, bluetooth will be automatically turned on. The mobile phone can search the MIDI Bluetooth signal of this piano. After the connection, the playing software on the mobile phone can realize the wireless connection with the piano.
  7. Supports Cubase，FI Studio，Logic，Live ect. arrangement software

Specifications:

  • Piano Color: Black color
  • Piano Dimensions:31.69inx6.96inx2.28in （without metal stand）
  • Keyboard key Dimensions: White key width is 0.787in
  • Package Dimensions:20.47 in x 10.62 in x 6.69 in
  • Package Weight: 6.16 lbs/ 2.8kg
  • Model：GPP-204

Keyboard

  • Number of keys: 61Key
  • Action: Full Size Semi-Weighted Action
  • Key Type: Piano-style
  • Metronome：Yes
  • Split/transpose control: Yes

Sounds

  • Sound Source:Superior Quality Custom Dream Sound Source
  • Polyphony (max): 8-note
  • Demo Songs:80
  • Rhythm:200
  • Timbre:200

Connectivity

  • MIDI Connectivity: MIDI over MIDI Bluetooth
  • Bluetooth：Audio Bluetooth and MIDI Bluetooth
  • USB MIDI Connectivity: Yes
  • Recording：Yes
  • Headphone Jacks: 1 (1/8" Jack)
  • Expandability Available: No
  • AUX Input: Yes
  • Line Output: Yes
  • Line Input: Yes
  • One Pedal System： Sustain Pedal

Onboard Features

  • Recording/Playback MIDI Sequencer
  • Accompaniment Styles: Comprehensive Chord Accompaniment
  • Preset Songs: 80
  • Display: LED
  • Built-in speakers: Yes (2* 3W)

Package Includes:

1 x Digital Piano

1 x Power Adapter

1 x Plastic Sustain Pedal

1 x Keyboard Sticker

1 x 420D Bag

1 x Manual
